risk: Legacy URL deletion, slug changes or broad redirects destroy traffic/link/history signals
leading_indicator: Redirects proposed before full crawl/GSC/backlink analysis; sudden indexed-page or click loss
prevention: Preservation default; URL inventory; content-equivalence and redirect map; staging crawl; backup; change log
mitigation: Roll back reversible changes; restore URLs/content; correct canonicals/redirects; request recrawl; targeted link recovery
decision_gate: No migration or consolidation without signed legacy-URL evidence pack
contingency: Freeze migration; improve in place; phase changes by cohort
evidence_or_notes: Owner brief explicitly prohibits destructive URL decisions before complete analysis.

risk: Keyword cannibalization and duplicated intent across price, procedure, provider and location pages
leading_indicator: Multiple URLs alternate for same query; unstable ranks; high overlap; internal links conflict
prevention: Query-to-task taxonomy; top-ten overlap analysis; one canonical intent; content-difference thresholds
mitigation: Merge only with evidence; canonical/internal-link cleanup; re-scope pages; monitor query-page pairs
decision_gate: No page production batch before canonical map approval
contingency: Hold/noindex low-value candidates; consolidate in-place without unnecessary slug changes
evidence_or_notes: Wave 0 map is provisional; all metrics and SERPs are DATA REQUIRED.

risk: Scaled/thin AI or programmatic pages trigger spam, low quality or index bloat
leading_indicator: Rapid URL growth without unique data/review; low indexation; crawl waste; manual-action signals
prevention: Unique-value schema; verified inventory thresholds; reviewer capacity gate; anti-doorway rules; editorial sampling
mitigation: Stop generation; noindex/remove low-value templates after evidence review; improve canonical hubs; submit reconsideration if needed
decision_gate: No bulk generation until unique data, review, demand and QA thresholds are proven
contingency: Limit launch to manually governed cohorts; use search/facets without indexation
evidence_or_notes: Google spam-policy review and owner brief support this control.

risk: AI/AIO/GEO work distracts from ordinary technical and editorial SEO
leading_indicator: Special files/markup prioritized over crawlability, internal links, evidence and page experience
prevention: Use ordinary SEO fundamentals; indexed/snippet-eligible pages; visible-text/data parity; measure in Search Console
mitigation: Remove speculative complexity; refocus on crawl, content, entities, authority and original data
decision_gate: No GEO feature may bypass core SEO and user-value QA
contingency: Treat llms.txt and emerging conventions as experiments, not ranking guarantees
evidence_or_notes: Official Google guidance says no special AI file or schema is required for AI features.

risk: Medical misinformation or unsupported clinical claims
leading_indicator: Claims lack source IDs; reviewer expired; user complaints; clinician escalation; contradictions
prevention: Claim ledger; risk tiers; named specialty review; source hierarchy; expiry/re-review; correction policy
mitigation: Unpublish or add prominent correction; clinician review; notify affected partners; root-cause analysis
decision_gate: M2–M4 content cannot publish without required review and evidence
contingency: Publish narrower neutral navigation content or hold page
evidence_or_notes: YMYL/high-risk scope; no claim should be inferred from competitor copy.

risk: Stale medical, regulatory, payer, price or availability information
leading_indicator: Source past review date; broken source; mismatch with provider feed; complaint rate rises
prevention: Freshness fields; source/date display; expiry rules; automated and manual review queues; feed timestamps
mitigation: Suppress stale fields; add uncertainty; re-verify; revert to request-based flow
decision_gate: No 'current' label without timestamp and source
contingency: Show DATA REQUIRED / contact-to-confirm rather than stale certainty
evidence_or_notes: Public price/provider pages currently need formal freshness methodology.

risk: Medical reviewer capacity becomes the production bottleneck
leading_indicator: Draft backlog; review turnaround misses SLA; re-review coverage falls; reviewer conflicts
prevention: Capacity model by risk/vertical; retainer roster; standardized evidence packs; publish only to capacity
mitigation: Reduce cadence; prioritize head-term pillars and money pages; recruit/contract specialists; narrow claims
decision_gate: No content plan beyond verified review capacity
contingency: Use M0/M1 non-clinical work while M2–M4 queue is constrained
evidence_or_notes: Reviewer roster and costs are OWNER DATA REQUIRED.

risk: Competitor prose is copied or lightly rewritten
leading_indicator: High textual similarity; identical structure/claims; copyright complaints
prevention: Competitor coverage matrix without prose extraction; draft from primary evidence and user tasks; similarity checks
mitigation: Rewrite from evidence; remove infringing assets; legal review; document provenance
decision_gate: No publication without source-led brief and originality QA
contingency: Publish original datasets, clinician Q&A and local decision tools instead
evidence_or_notes: Owner brief prohibits copying or lightly rewriting competitors.

risk: Provider shown as verified without reliable identity/license/specialty/status evidence
leading_indicator: Missing verification source/date; mismatch with official registry; user/provider complaint
prevention: Identity proof; official registry checks; specialty verification; periodic re-check; status/sanction monitoring; audit log
mitigation: Suspend badge/profile/lead routing; investigate; correct; notify affected users/partners as advised
decision_gate: No verification badge or paid lead until full verification record exists
contingency: List as unverified informational record only if legally appropriate, or do not list
evidence_or_notes: Official Israeli registry source set remains queued.

risk: Supplier, device or product represented as approved/authorized/available without evidence
leading_indicator: Missing AMAR/status docs; expired authorization; stock mismatch; unsupported claims
prevention: Product-status ledger; document verification; supplier authorization; claim controls; timestamped stock
mitigation: Delist/suppress offer; stop orders/leads; notify buyers; recall/escalation process
decision_gate: No checkout/quote routing without status and supplier verification appropriate to category
contingency: Information-only page with official-source links; no commercial CTA
evidence_or_notes: Israeli device/AMAR research pending.

risk: Fake, incentivized or manipulated reviews
leading_indicator: Review spikes; duplicate text/devices; low verified-encounter ratio; provider disputes
prevention: Eligibility based on verified encounter where lawful; incentive disclosure/prohibition; fraud detection; moderation; appeals
mitigation: Quarantine/remove reviews; investigate accounts/providers; publish enforcement note where appropriate
decision_gate: No public aggregate score until eligibility and fraud controls meet threshold
contingency: Launch without reviews; use verified factual profile data and structured feedback privately
evidence_or_notes: A review policy is a launch prerequisite.

risk: Before/after images are unconsented, misleading, edited or imply guaranteed outcomes
leading_indicator: No consent record; metadata absent; inconsistent lighting/pose; complaints; reused stock images
prevention: Written granular consent; provenance; editing policy; standardized capture; disclaimer; withdrawal process
mitigation: Remove media; suspend provider media rights; investigate; notify/legal response
decision_gate: No before/after publication without consent/provenance/QA
contingency: Use medically reviewed illustrations or procedure diagrams
evidence_or_notes: High-risk aesthetics/plastic-surgery issue.

risk: Paid placement is confused with clinical quality, editorial judgment or organic ranking
leading_indicator: Sponsored providers dominate; labels unclear; sales can alter editorial conclusions
prevention: Separate ad/editorial systems and governance; conspicuous labels; ranking methodology; conflict register; audit
mitigation: Remove/relable placement; refund/credit as applicable; public correction; disciplinary process
decision_gate: No sponsorship product before policy, UI labeling and audit controls
contingency: Sell non-ranking sponsorships or professional tools instead
evidence_or_notes: Owner brief requires separation.

risk: First-contact forms collect diagnoses, medications, files or detailed histories unnecessarily
leading_indicator: Free-text health details appear in CRM/analytics/email; staff access broad
prevention: Minimal structured first contact; explicit instruction not to submit clinical details; sensitive channel only when needed
mitigation: Purge/quarantine data per policy; restrict access; notify privacy/security; redesign form
decision_gate: No lead form launch without data-minimization review
contingency: Use service/region/timing/payer/language/contact/consent fields only
evidence_or_notes: Owner brief explicitly prohibits generic collection of detailed medical data.

risk: Consent is vague, bundled, not provable or not channel/purpose specific
leading_indicator: Missing consent timestamp/text/version; high complaints/unsubscribes; routing disputes
prevention: Versioned consent ledger; granular purposes/channels; clear provider-sharing disclosure; withdrawal workflow
mitigation: Stop processing/routing; obtain valid consent where appropriate; delete/suppress; investigate
decision_gate: No direct marketing or provider transfer without approved consent basis
contingency: Use service-only communications and manual confirmation
evidence_or_notes: Exact Israeli Amendment 13 implications require qualified review.

risk: Health/PII leaks into ordinary analytics, ad platforms, call tracking or URLs
leading_indicator: Free text/query params in events; advertising audiences built from sensitive pages; vendor logs contain health details
prevention: Event dictionary; URL/query sanitization; server-side filtering; vendor configuration; no sensitive custom dimensions; DPIA
mitigation: Disable affected tags; purge where possible; incident assessment; notify advisers/authorities/users as required
owner: Privacy officer + analytics lead + security lead
decision_gate: No production analytics until data-flow test passes
contingency: Use aggregate first-party minimal analytics and consented measurement
evidence_or_notes: High-risk health context.

risk: International/vendor data transfer, residency or processor terms are noncompliant or opaque
leading_indicator: Unknown subprocessors/regions; vendor changes; missing DPA/security evidence
prevention: Vendor register; data maps; DPA/SCC/transfer review as applicable; residency requirements; portability and exit plan
mitigation: Suspend transfer; switch region/vendor; export/delete data; legal incident process
decision_gate: No sensitive-data vendor without due diligence and approved transfer basis
contingency: Use local/approved infrastructure or manual process
evidence_or_notes: Israeli legal analysis and owner stack inventory pending.

risk: Account takeover affects patients, providers, suppliers or staff
leading_indicator: Credential stuffing; unusual logins; MFA adoption low; support reset fraud
prevention: MFA/passkeys; rate limits; breached-password checks; risk-based auth; secure recovery; session/device controls
mitigation: Force resets/revocation; suspend account; investigate/audit; notify as required
decision_gate: No sensitive account features without strong authentication and recovery
contingency: Launch anonymous/saved-local journeys first; staff-assisted access
evidence_or_notes: Member/professional ecosystem creates material account risk.

risk: Prompt injection or malicious content manipulates AI retrieval/agents
leading_indicator: AI follows page/document instructions; unauthorized tool calls; data exfiltration tests succeed
prevention: Treat retrieved content as untrusted; tool allowlists; least privilege; content isolation; human approval; red-team tests
mitigation: Disable affected tools/agent; rotate secrets; inspect logs; patch filters/policies; notify security
decision_gate: No agent with write/send/book capability before adversarial evaluation and approval
contingency: Read-only citation-grounded search with no actions
evidence_or_notes: OWASP identifies prompt injection and excessive agency risks.

risk: AI discloses sensitive data or cross-user information
leading_indicator: Canary data appears; tenant isolation test fails; provider/patient records in prompts/logs
prevention: Data minimization; tenant isolation; retrieval ACLs; prompt/log redaction; no training use without agreement; evaluation
mitigation: Shut down feature; revoke access; incident response; vendor escalation; delete affected data where possible
decision_gate: No personalized AI before isolation and leakage tests pass
contingency: Anonymous public-corpus search only
evidence_or_notes: NIST/WHO/OWASP governance baseline.

risk: WordPress/plugin/theme vulnerability or supply-chain compromise
leading_indicator: Unsupported versions; critical CVEs; excessive plugins; admin anomalies; file changes
prevention: Version/SBOM inventory; minimal vetted plugins; rapid patching; WAF; least privilege; code review; staging; backups
mitigation: Isolate site; restore clean backup; patch/remove component; rotate credentials; forensic review
decision_gate: No major feature launch without dependency/security review
contingency: Replace plugin with controlled code or vendor; temporarily disable feature
evidence_or_notes: Live stack versions and plugin inventory are OWNER DATA REQUIRED.

risk: Backups, disaster recovery or deployment rollback fail
leading_indicator: Restore tests fail; backups share failure domain; undocumented deployment
prevention: Encrypted immutable/offsite backups; restore drills; infrastructure/config as code; rollback runbook
mitigation: Activate incident/DR; rebuild from clean environment; manual service continuity
decision_gate: No transactional/sensitive data launch before successful restore test
contingency: Operate request-only/manual fallback and maintenance mode
evidence_or_notes: Architecture audit pending.

risk: Insufficient verified provider supply creates empty/doorway pages and poor matching
leading_indicator: Low providers per specialty/city; high no-match rate; stale profiles
prevention: Anchor-supply acquisition before public listings; minimum inventory thresholds; staged vertical/geography launch
mitigation: Noindex/hold thin listings; widen region transparently; concierge/manual matching; recruit supply
decision_gate: No specialty/location page before supply threshold and response SLA
contingency: Launch national guides and request-based concierge for limited wedges
evidence_or_notes: Supply inventory is OWNER DATA REQUIRED.

risk: Providers respond slowly, reject leads or lack real capacity
leading_indicator: Low contact/acceptance; long first-response; high expiry; complaints
prevention: Capacity fields; acceptance workflow; routing order; SLA; pause/full states; response scorecard
mitigation: Reroute with consent; replace lead per policy; suspend low-response providers; manual coordination
decision_gate: No paid lead scale until acceptance and response thresholds are met
contingency: Default single-provider route; maximum-three comparison route only when justified
evidence_or_notes: Operational event data pending.

risk: Duplicate, low-quality or misrouted leads create disputes and refunds
leading_indicator: High duplicate/rejection/refund rate; mismatch reasons; provider churn
prevention: Clear qualified-lead definition; dedupe; eligibility rules; consent; routing logs; replacement policy
mitigation: Investigate event trail; credit/refund per published contract; tune matching; training
decision_gate: No fee model before definitions/contracts/event tracking
contingency: Subscription or concierge pilot instead of per-lead billing
evidence_or_notes: CRM/contract data pending.

risk: Appointment availability is claimed but not real or synchronized
leading_indicator: Booked slots rejected; double bookings; high reschedule/cancel; stale timestamps
prevention: Use 'request' label unless real integration; timestamped slots; confirmation states; calendar failure monitoring
mitigation: Apologize/reroute; suppress provider slots; revert to request-based flow; compensate per policy
decision_gate: No 'real-time availability' claim without tested integration and SLA
contingency: Request-based booking with human confirmation
evidence_or_notes: Current public page does not prove availability.

risk: Marketplace chicken-and-egg causes high burn before liquidity
leading_indicator: Acquisition cost rises; low matches; weak repeat; broad verticals all under-supplied
prevention: Start with 2–3 evidence-backed wedges; anchor partners; local density; measure match/response/unit economics
mitigation: Stop weak wedges; concentrate demand/supply; shift to subscription/content/concierge revenue
decision_gate: Expansion only after wedge thresholds and payback evidence
contingency: Maintain authority content while delaying transaction expansion
evidence_or_notes: Foundation recommendation.

risk: Returns, warranties, installation and service overwhelm B2C/B2B operations
leading_indicator: High support tickets, delays, damaged goods, warranty disputes, negative reviews
prevention: Category-level operating model; supplier SLA; service network; clear returns; RMA tracking; assisted high-ticket sales
mitigation: Pause affected category/supplier; outsource service; refunds/replacements; revise terms
decision_gate: No category launch without owner for after-sales lifecycle
contingency: Use referral/curated partner model instead of taking merchant-of-record risk
evidence_or_notes: Supplier/margin/fulfillment data pending.

risk: Inventory working capital and obsolescence create cash loss
leading_indicator: Slow turns; stock aging; recalls/model changes; cash conversion worsens
prevention: Start marketplace/dropship/affiliate; demand validation; SKU limits; purchase controls; supplier terms
mitigation: Markdown/return stock where lawful; stop reorders; switch model; reserve for write-down
decision_gate: No owned inventory without SKU economics and working-capital approval
contingency: Curated marketplace or quote model
evidence_or_notes: Financial model pending.

risk: Payment fraud, chargebacks or invoice/tax errors
leading_indicator: Chargeback spikes; mismatched identities; failed invoices; reconciliation gaps
prevention: 3DS/risk controls; verified professional buyers for B2B; invoice/tax design; reconciliation; transaction limits
mitigation: Hold/refund; dispute evidence; block accounts; processor escalation; accounting correction
decision_gate: No checkout before fraud/tax/invoice sign-off
contingency: Manual invoice/quote for high-ticket B2B
evidence_or_notes: Israeli payments/tax research and owner processor data pending.

risk: Prescription-drug commerce or pharmacy integration lacks an exact licensed model
leading_indicator: Product roadmap assumes checkout; no pharmacy license/partner; unclear prescription handling
prevention: Information/reference first; official drug sources; qualified pharmacy/legal review; licensed partner contract
mitigation: Disable commerce/availability; remove claims; redirect to licensed professional guidance
decision_gate: No prescription transaction feature without written model approval
contingency: Authoritative medicine reference only
evidence_or_notes: Explicit owner-brief prohibition.

risk: Medical-device classification, registration or claims are wrong
leading_indicator: Missing/expired status; marketing claim exceeds intended use; professional-only product sold to consumer
prevention: Product-level status/claims ledger; qualified device expert; supplier documentation; monitoring
mitigation: Delist; stop sales/leads; notify buyers/advisers; recall/escalation where required
decision_gate: No commercial availability without verified status for exact model/use
contingency: Educational category pages with official links only
evidence_or_notes: AMAR/device source set queued.

risk: Medical advertising, testimonials, reviews or professional-title claims breach Israeli rules
leading_indicator: Complaints; regulator contact; unsupported specialty/quality/outcome language
prevention: Legal advertising checklist; approved copy patterns; title verification; sponsor labels; testimonial/media controls
mitigation: Remove/correct claim; suspend campaign/profile; preserve evidence; legal response
decision_gate: No campaign/template launch without legal sign-off by risk class
contingency: Neutral factual discovery and education
evidence_or_notes: Qualified Israeli legal review required.

risk: Privacy Protection Law Amendment 13 obligations are misinterpreted
leading_indicator: Unclear controller/holder/processor roles; missing notices/register; adviser disagreement
prevention: Map operating roles/data flows; use official consolidated text/guidance; obtain qualified Israeli privacy advice
mitigation: Pause affected processing; remediate notices/contracts/security/rights processes; incident response
decision_gate: No sensitive feature launch until applicability checklist signed
contingency: Anonymous/minimal-data services only
evidence_or_notes: Wave 0 deliberately gives checklist, not legal conclusion.

risk: General-purpose LLM gives diagnosis, triage, treatment, medication or image-analysis advice
leading_indicator: Red-team prompts elicit clinical recommendations; users rely on output; safety escalations
prevention: Scope blocks; risk classifier; refusal/escalation; public-corpus RAG only for education; human review; regulated vendor boundary
mitigation: Disable feature; publish correction/warning; incident review; notify advisers/users as appropriate
owner: AI safety review board + medical governance
decision_gate: No M4 AI launch without regulated model, validation and safety case
contingency: Citation-grounded navigation and administrative assistance only
evidence_or_notes: Owner brief explicitly prohibits general-purpose clinical LLM use.

risk: AI hallucination or citation mismatch corrupts public content or provider/product data
leading_indicator: Unsupported statements; broken citations; wrong provider/device facts; low evaluation scores
prevention: Grounded retrieval; source locking; structured data; per-claim citation; human approval; automated contradiction/freshness tests
mitigation: Retract/correct; disable generation path; audit corpus/model/version; add regression test
decision_gate: No autonomous publication or data mutation
contingency: Draft-only assistant with mandatory review
evidence_or_notes: NIST/WHO governance and claim-ledger controls.

risk: Vendor/model lock-in compromises portability, cost or governance
leading_indicator: Proprietary prompts/data/tools; no export; price shocks; performance tied to one model
prevention: Provider-neutral orchestration; standardized retrieval/data; eval suite; contract exit/export; dual-provider plan
mitigation: Migrate model/vendor using eval baseline; degrade to search/manual operations
decision_gate: No strategic data stored only in vendor-specific format
contingency: Open standards and WordPress/GitHub-controlled source of truth
evidence_or_notes: Portability is a core owner constraint.

risk: Patient-specific aesthetic simulation implies guaranteed outcome or mishandles biometric imagery
leading_indicator: Users/providers treat simulation as prediction; no consent/retention control; complaints
prevention: Separate education from prediction; licensed vendor; consent; disclaimer; standardized capture; deletion; clinician-led consultation
mitigation: Disable simulation; purge data; correct marketing; provider suspension; legal/privacy incident response
decision_gate: No patient-specific simulation without full safety/privacy/legal sign-off
contingency: Educational 3D anatomy/procedure assets only
evidence_or_notes: High-risk distinction in owner brief.

risk: Heavy media, search, commerce or 3D degrades Core Web Vitals and mobile conversion
leading_indicator: LCP/INP/CLS regressions; high mobile abandonment; asset weight exceeds budget
prevention: Performance budgets; selective interactivity; optimized images/video/glTF; CDN; lazy load; real-user monitoring
mitigation: Disable/defer heavy modules; compress assets; simplify templates; cache/query optimization
decision_gate: No release if agreed performance budget fails on representative mobile devices
contingency: Still/video fallback; server-rendered core journey
evidence_or_notes: Technical architecture pending.

risk: Hebrew RTL, forms, comparison, booking, commerce or 3D are inaccessible
leading_indicator: Keyboard/screen-reader failures; focus order wrong in RTL; unlabeled errors; complaints
prevention: WCAG 2.2 target; accessible component system; Hebrew/RTL testing; alternatives for media/3D; audits
mitigation: Hotfix blockers; provide accessible alternative; remediation plan; user support
decision_gate: No public release with critical accessibility failures
contingency: Simpler accessible HTML flow/manual assistance
evidence_or_notes: WCAG 2.2 baseline; Israeli legal scope pending.

risk: Over-expansion across 36 workstreams burns capital before evidence or operating capacity
leading_indicator: Many partial launches; low-quality content; weak supply; missed SLAs; cash runway falls
prevention: Wave gates; portfolio scoring; 2–3 wedge pilots; owner decisions; kill criteria; capacity-based plans
mitigation: Stop unfunded features/verticals; concentrate team; renegotiate vendors; preserve core assets
decision_gate: No next phase without evidence, capacity and budget gate
contingency: Authority platform + one validated revenue engine
evidence_or_notes: Central pre-mortem conclusion.

risk: Unit economics are built on invented benchmarks or untracked funnel events
leading_indicator: Model lacks source/assumption labels; definitions differ; revenue/refunds not reconciled
prevention: Source/assumption/sensitivity separation; event dictionary; cohort data; low/base/high scenarios; finance sign-off
mitigation: Rebuild model; freeze scaling; run paid/supply pilots; improve instrumentation
decision_gate: No scale investment without reconciled unit economics
contingency: Use capped pilots and milestone funding
evidence_or_notes: 24_FINANCIAL_MODEL.xlsx is intentionally pending.

risk: A privacy, medical, provider, review or fulfillment incident damages national trust
leading_indicator: Complaint volume, press/social escalation, partner churn, branded-search sentiment decline
prevention: Transparent policies; incident ownership; training; audits; escalation; corrections; support SLAs
mitigation: Incident command; factual communication; user remediation; independent review; corrective actions
decision_gate: Board-level incident thresholds and response plan required before scale
contingency: Pause affected vertical/feature while core knowledge portal remains available
evidence_or_notes: Trust is a prerequisite, not a marketing layer.

risk: KPI optimization rewards lead volume over safety, relevance, consent or user value
leading_indicator: Lead volume rises while refunds/complaints/no-shows or provider churn worsen
prevention: North-star plus guardrails; quality/risk KPIs; provider/user outcomes; no sensitive data in analytics
mitigation: Change incentives; stop experiment; refund/repair; revise scorecards and compensation
decision_gate: No experiment without quality and risk metrics
contingency: Optimize qualified matches, verified supply and resolved user tasks instead
evidence_or_notes: KPI tree pending Wave 8.

risk: Provider, product, price and terminology entities lack stable IDs/versioning/provenance
leading_indicator: Duplicates; broken relationships; conflicting prices/status; AI retrieval errors
prevention: Canonical IDs; source/version fields; change history; dedupe; ownership and stewardship
mitigation: Data cleanup; merge with audit trail; suppress uncertain fields; rebuild indexes
decision_gate: No scaled listings or AI retrieval before entity model and stewardship exist
contingency: Manual curated cohort
evidence_or_notes: Ontology and product/provider data models pending Waves 4–6.

risk: Refund/replacement/lead contracts conflict with site promises or operating reality
leading_indicator: Provider disputes; inconsistent credits; consumer complaints; revenue leakage
prevention: Definitions, SLAs, acceptance/rejection, expiry, duplicates, replacement/refund terms and audit trail
mitigation: Apply fair interim policy; reconcile accounts; amend contracts/content; retrain sales/ops
decision_gate: No per-lead/booking fee before contract and event model sign-off
contingency: Subscription or pilot service fee
evidence_or_notes: Owner contracts and CRM data pending.

risk: Anchor hospital/clinic/supplier partners demand exclusivity or influence editorial decisions
leading_indicator: Contract terms constrain neutrality; content changes tied to commercial deal
prevention: Editorial independence clause; conflict disclosure; diversified supply; governance review
mitigation: Reject/renegotiate; disclose; recuse; diversify partners
decision_gate: No strategic partnership that compromises ranking/editorial independence
contingency: Non-exclusive pilot with clear data/service scope
evidence_or_notes: Category-leader ambition depends on trust and neutral methodology.
